006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
027
028/**
029 * Transport-agnostic JSON-RPC dispatcher for the MCP wire protocol.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * The dispatcher contains <em>zero</em> HTTP plumbing; it accepts a parsed {@link JsonRpcRequest},
033 * routes by {@code method}, and returns a {@link JsonRpcResponse}. {@link McpRestServlet} is a thin
034 * adapter that wraps this dispatcher in a Juneau REST {@code @RestPost} method, but embedders are
035 * free to call {@link #dispatch(JsonRpcRequest, McpServerConfig, BeanStore)} directly from
036 * tests or from a non-Juneau servlet.
037 *
038 * <p>
039 * Notification requests (those with a {@code null} {@link JsonRpcRequest#getId() id}) return
040 * {@code null}; HTTP adapters should map this to {@code 204 No Content}.
041 */
042public class McpDispatcher {
043
044   /** JSON-RPC error code: parse error. */
045   public static final int CODE_PARSE_ERROR = -32700;
046
047   /** JSON-RPC error code: invalid request. */
048   public static final int CODE_INVALID_REQUEST = -32600;
049
050   /** JSON-RPC error code: method not found. */
051   public static final int CODE_METHOD_NOT_FOUND = -32601;
052
053   /** JSON-RPC error code: invalid params. */
054   public static final int CODE_INVALID_PARAMS = -32602;
055
056   /** JSON-RPC error code: internal error. */
057   public static final int CODE_INTERNAL_ERROR = -32603;
058
059   /**
060    * Default server name used when {@link McpServerConfig#getServerInfo()} is {@code null}.
061    */
062   public static final String DEFAULT_SERVER_NAME = "juneau-rest-server-mcp";
063
064   /**
065    * Dispatch the supplied JSON-RPC request against the supplied configuration.
066    *
067    * @param req JSON-RPC request envelope. Never {@code null}.
068    * @param config Server config (handler registry, capabilities, cursor strategy). Never {@code null}.
069    * @param ctx Per-request bean store (passed through to handlers). Never {@code null}.
070    * @return The response, or {@code null} for notification requests.
071    */
072   public JsonRpcResponse dispatch(JsonRpcRequest req, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx) {
073      if (req == null)
074         return errorResponse(null, CODE_INVALID_REQUEST, "Request envelope is null", null);
075
076      var id = req.getId();
077      var method = req.getMethod();
078
079      if (isEmpty(method))
080         return notification(id) ? null : errorResponse(id, CODE_INVALID_REQUEST, "Missing method", null);
081
082      try {
083         var result = invoke(method, req.getParams(), config, ctx);
084         return notification(id) ? null : ok(id, result);
085      } catch (McpException e) {
086         return notification(id) ? null : new JsonRpcResponse()
087            .setJsonrpc(McpProtocol.JSON_RPC_2_0)
088            .setId(id)
089            .setError(e.toJsonRpcError());
090      } catch (Exception e) {
091         if (notification(id))
092            return null;
093         var message = e.getMessage() == null ? cns(e) : e.getMessage();
094         return errorResponse(id, CODE_INTERNAL_ERROR, message, JsonMap.of("type", cn(e)));
095      }
096   }
097
098   private static boolean notification(Object id) {
099      return id == null;
100   }
101
102   private Object invoke(String method, Object params, McpServerConfig config, BeanStore ctx) {
103      switch (method) {
104         case McpMethods.INITIALIZE:
105            return initialize(config);
106         case McpMethods.PING:
107            return new JsonMap();
108         case McpMethods.TOOLS_LIST:
109            return listTools(config, params, ctx);
110         case McpMethods.TOOLS_CALL:
111            return callTool(config, params, ctx);
112         case McpMethods.PROMPTS_LIST:
113            return listPrompts(config, params, ctx);
114         case McpMethods.PROMPTS_GET:
115            return getPrompt(config, params, ctx);
116         case McpMethods.RESOURCES_LIST:
117            return listResources(config, params, ctx);
118         case McpMethods.RESOURCES_READ:
119            return readResource(config, params, ctx);
120         default:
121            throw new McpException(CODE_METHOD_NOT_FOUND, "Method not found: " + method);
122      }
123   }
124
125   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
126   // initialize / capabilities
127   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
128
129   private static InitializeResult initialize(McpServerConfig config) {
130      var caps = config.getCapabilities();
131      if (caps == null) {
132         caps = new ServerCapabilities();
133         if (! config.getTools().isEmpty())
134            caps.setTools(new ToolCapability());
135         if (! config.getPrompts().isEmpty())
136            caps.setPrompts(new PromptCapability());
137         if (! config.getResources().isEmpty())
138            caps.setResources(new ResourceCapability());
139      }
140      var info = config.getServerInfo();
141      if (info == null)
142         info = new Implementation().setName(DEFAULT_SERVER_NAME).setVersion("unknown");
143      return new InitializeResult()
144         .setProtocolVersion(config.getProtocolVersion())
145         .setCapabilities(caps)
146         .setServerInfo(info)
147         .setInstructions(config.getInstructions());
148   }
149
150   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
151   // tools
152   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
153
154   private static ListToolsResult listTools(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
155      var descriptors = config.getTools().stream().map(McpToolHandler::descriptor).toList();
156      var page = config.getCursor().page(descriptors, cursorOf(params), ctx);
157      return new ListToolsResult().setTools(page.items()).setNextCursor(page.nextCursor());
158   }
159
160   private static CallToolResult callTool(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
161      var p = asMap(params);
162      var name = strParam(p, "name");
163      if (name == null)
164         throw new McpException(CODE_INVALID_PARAMS, "Missing tool name");
165      var handler = config.getTools().stream()
166         .filter(h -> name.equals(h.descriptor().getName()))
167         .findFirst()
168         .orElseThrow(() -> new McpException(CODE_METHOD_NOT_FOUND, "Tool not found: " + name));
169      var args = mapParam(p, "arguments");
170      return handler.call(args, ctx);
171   }
172
173   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
174   // prompts
175   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
176
177   private static ListPromptsResult listPrompts(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
178      var descriptors = config.getPrompts().stream().map(McpPromptHandler::descriptor).toList();
179      var page = config.getCursor().page(descriptors, cursorOf(params), ctx);
180      return new ListPromptsResult().setPrompts(page.items()).setNextCursor(page.nextCursor());
181   }
182
183   private static GetPromptResult getPrompt(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
184      var p = asMap(params);
185      var name = strParam(p, "name");
186      if (name == null)
187         throw new McpException(CODE_INVALID_PARAMS, "Missing prompt name");
188      var handler = config.getPrompts().stream()
189         .filter(h -> name.equals(h.descriptor().getName()))
190         .findFirst()
191         .orElseThrow(() -> new McpException(CODE_METHOD_NOT_FOUND, "Prompt not found: " + name));
192      var args = mapParam(p, "arguments");
193      return handler.get(args, ctx);
194   }
195
196   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
197   // resources
198   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
199
200   private static ListResourcesResult listResources(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
201      var descriptors = config.getResources().stream().map(McpResourceHandler::descriptor).toList();
202      var page = config.getCursor().page(descriptors, cursorOf(params), ctx);
203      return new ListResourcesResult().setResources(page.items()).setNextCursor(page.nextCursor());
204   }
205
206   private static ReadResourceResult readResource(McpServerConfig config, Object params, BeanStore ctx) {
207      var p = asMap(params);
208      var uri = strParam(p, "uri");
209      if (uri == null)
210         throw new McpException(CODE_INVALID_PARAMS, "Missing resource uri");
211      var handler = config.getResources().stream()
212         .filter(h -> uri.equals(h.descriptor().getUri()))
213         .findFirst()
214         .orElseThrow(() -> new McpException(CODE_METHOD_NOT_FOUND, "Resource not found: " + uri));
215      return handler.read(uri, ctx);
216   }
217
218   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
219   // helpers
220   // -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
221
222   private static String cursorOf(Object params) {
223      return strParam(asMap(params), "cursor");
224   }
225
226   @SuppressWarnings({
227      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type parameter verified by MCP protocol contract.
228   })
229   private static Map<String, Object> asMap(Object params) {
230      if (params == null)
231         return Map.of();
232      if (params instanceof Map)
233         return (Map<String, Object>) params;
234      throw new McpException(CODE_INVALID_PARAMS, "Params must be an object");
235   }
236
237   private static String strParam(Map<String, Object> p, String key) {
238      var v = p.get(key);
239      return v == null ? null : v.toString();
240   }
241
242   @SuppressWarnings({
243      "unchecked" // Cast is safe: type parameter verified by MCP protocol contract.
244   })
245   private static Map<String, Object> mapParam(Map<String, Object> p, String key) {
246      var v = p.get(key);
247      if (v == null)
248         return Map.of();
249      if (v instanceof Map)
250         return (Map<String, Object>) v;
251      throw new McpException(CODE_INVALID_PARAMS, "Param '" + key + "' must be an object");
252   }
253
254   private static JsonRpcResponse ok(Object id, Object result) {
255      return new JsonRpcResponse()
256         .setJsonrpc(McpProtocol.JSON_RPC_2_0)
257         .setId(id)
258         .setResult(result);
259   }
260
261   private static JsonRpcResponse errorResponse(Object id, int code, String message, Object data) {
262      return new JsonRpcResponse()
263         .setJsonrpc(McpProtocol.JSON_RPC_2_0)
264         .setId(id)
265         .setError(new JsonRpcError().setCode(code).setMessage(message).setData(data));
266   }
267}
